_comment: Hyperlane agent config for MAINNET validators + relayer (Phase 4). JSON has no comments, so remaining fill-me values are zero-address / index.from=0 placeholders written by the Phase 1 core deploy — see README.md. interchainGasPaymaster stays 0x0: core-config.initial.yaml deploys no IGP (protocolFee hook). Canonical chains (ethereum, base) pull metadata + addresses from the hyperlane-registry; only RPC overrides are set here. 'hydration' is a custom chain and is fully specified. NOTE: rpcUrls here are unused fallbacks at agent runtime — the compose files pass private RPCs via --chains.*.customRpcUrls from deploy/*/.env; never commit credentialed URLs to this file.
